zh.title: Connective | 张三
zh.metaDescription: Connective 帮助访问者复制 Prompt，并用自己的 AI 助手写出更清楚的第一句话。

hero.title: 让连接从更好的第一句话开始
hero.lede: 选择一个联系目的，复制一段上下文 Prompt，交给你常用的大模型，让它帮你把开场白说清楚。

contextCards.title: 张三关心什么
contextCards.body: AI 时代的表达、写作、个人连接、Agent、长期关系，以及技术如何帮助人更准确地说出自己的意图。

contextCards.title: 你可以找他聊什么
contextCards.body: 一个真实的认识、一篇文章里的判断、一个还没完全成形但值得一起推演的想法。

contextCards.title: 一些虚构痕迹
contextCards.body: 张三长期写关于 AI、产品、组织和个人判断的长文，也关注 Agent、数据、评估和真实产品落地之间的关系。

dialog.title: 把 Prompt 交给你的 AI 助手
dialog.description: 点一个平台，会先复制 Prompt，再打开对应助手。也可以只复制。

contact.body: 先复制 Prompt，让你的 AI 助手帮你整理第一句话。然后通过你已有的渠道联系张三。

ui.copiedManualOpen: Prompt 已复制。请再次点击 {{modelName}} 打开。
ui.copyBlockedOpen: 浏览器不允许自动复制，Prompt 已选中。请按 Command+C / Ctrl+C 复制，再打开 {{modelName}}。
ui.copiedPrompt: Prompt 已复制。现在可以粘贴到你选择的大模型里。
ui.copyBlockedOnly: 浏览器不允许自动复制，Prompt 已选中。请按 Command+C / Ctrl+C 复制。

prompt.assistantRole: 你是我的私人沟通助手。
prompt.contextIntro: 我准备联系{{personName}}。下面是{{personName}}本人提供的个人上下文。
prompt.generationIntro: 请基于这个目的和下面的个人上下文，帮我生成：
tasks: 一段自然、不油腻的第一句话
一句我可以用来介绍自己的话
一个明确但不冒犯的联系意图
三个语气版本：轻松、真诚、直接
requirements: 不要假装我已经和{{personName}}很熟
不要过度夸张或过度热情
如果我的目的还不清楚，先向我追问 2-3 个问题
输出要适合发在微信、邮件或私信里

zh.profileContext:
# 张三 / Alex Zhang

## 一句话定位
张三，一个把写作、AI 和真实连接放在一起思考的虚构人物。

## 他关心什么
- 个人连接如何在 AI 时代变得更真诚，而不是更机械。
- 写作如何帮助一个人整理判断、经验和关系。
- AI Agent 如何成为人的表达外骨骼，而不是替代人的意图。
- 长期关系、真实合作、可以沉淀下来的对话。

## 你可以找他聊什么
- 认识他：如果你只是想认识一个具体的人，而不是交换名片。
- 聊一篇文章 / 一个观点：如果你读到某个观点，想继续推演、反驳或补充。
- 一起做点事：如果你有合作、访谈、项目、机会，或者只是一个还没有成形的想法。

## 一些虚构痕迹
- 他长期写关于 AI、产品、组织和个人判断的长文。
- 他关注 Agent、数据、评估和真实产品落地之间的关系。
- 他更在意一个人为什么开口，而不只是他通过什么渠道联系。
- 他希望技术帮助人更准确地表达自己，而不是制造更多模板化寒暄。

## 联系方式
- 微信：请先用复制出来的 Prompt 写好第一句话，再通过你已有的渠道联系他。
- GitHub：alex-zhang-lab
- 写作入口：一个公开笔记和文章入口，作为主要阅读路径。

meet.label: 认识我
meet.shortDescription: 写一段自然的破冰开场。
meet.addition: 这个场景偏向自然破冰。请让开场白像一个真实的人想认识另一个真实的人，而不是社交模板。

thought.label: 聊一篇文章 / 一个观点
thought.shortDescription: 围绕写作和思考发起对话。
thought.purposeText: 聊一篇文章 / 一个观点
thought.addition: 这个场景偏向围绕一篇文章、一个观点或一次表达继续交流。请先提醒我补充：我读到的内容是什么、哪个观点触发了我、我想继续讨论什么。

create.label: 一起做点事
create.addition: 这个场景偏向合作、访谈、项目或机会。请先帮助我说清楚：我想做什么、我能提供什么、我希望张三怎么回应。

en.title: Connective | Alex Zhang
en.metaDescription: Connective helps visitors copy a context prompt and use their own AI assistant to write a clearer first message.

hero.title: Start with a clearer first message
hero.lede: Choose why you want to reach out, copy a context prompt, and let your usual AI assistant help shape the opening line.

contextCards.title: What Alex cares about
contextCards.body: Expression in the AI era, writing, personal connection, agents, long-term relationships, and tools that help people state intent more clearly.

contextCards.title: What to ask him about
contextCards.body: A genuine introduction, a judgment from an essay, or an unfinished idea that might be worth thinking through together.

contextCards.title: Fictional traces
contextCards.body: Alex writes about AI, products, organizations, and personal judgment, with a focus on agents, data, evaluation, and real product delivery.

workbench.title: How do you want to begin?

dialog.title: Give the prompt to your AI assistant
dialog.description: Pick a platform to copy the prompt first, then open the assistant. You can also copy only.

contact.body: Copy the prompt first, let your AI assistant organize the first message, then contact Alex through a channel you already have.

ui.copiedManualOpen: Prompt copied. Click {{modelName}} again to open it.
ui.copyBlockedOpen: The browser blocked automatic copy. The prompt is selected. Press Command+C / Ctrl+C, then open {{modelName}}.
ui.copiedPrompt: Prompt copied. You can now paste it into the model you choose.
ui.copyBlockedOnly: The browser blocked automatic copy. The prompt is selected. Press Command+C / Ctrl+C.

prompt.assistantRole: You are my private communication assistant.
prompt.contextIntro: I am preparing to contact {{personName}}. Below is the personal context provided by {{personName}}.
prompt.generationIntro: Based on this intent and the personal context below, help me generate:
tasks: A natural first line that does not feel greasy or overdone
One sentence I can use to introduce myself
A clear but non-intrusive contact intent
Three tone options: casual, sincere, direct
requirements: Do not pretend I already know {{personName}} well
Do not exaggerate or sound overly enthusiastic
Do not invent experiences for me
If my intent is still unclear, ask me 2-3 follow-up questions first
The output should work for WeChat, email, or direct messages

en.profileContext:
# Alex Zhang / 张三

## One-line positioning
Alex Zhang is a fictional writer and product thinker who studies writing, AI, and genuine connection together.

## What he cares about
- How personal connection can become more sincere in the AI era, not more mechanical.
- How writing helps people organize judgment, experience, and relationships.
- How AI agents can become an expression exoskeleton for human intent instead of replacing it.
- Long-term relationships, real collaboration, and conversations that can accumulate over time.

## What you can ask him about
- Get to know him: when you want to meet a specific person, not just exchange contact cards.
- Discuss an essay or idea: when a point made you want to extend, challenge, or add to it.
- Collaborate on something: when you have a project, interview, opportunity, or unfinished idea.

## Fictional traces
- He regularly writes long essays about AI, products, organizations, and personal judgment.
- He follows the relationship between agents, data, evaluation, and real product delivery.
- He cares more about why someone reaches out than which channel they use.
- He wants technology to help people express themselves more accurately, not create more templated small talk.

## Contact
- WeChat: use the copied prompt to write the first message, then contact him through a channel you already have.
- GitHub: alex-zhang-lab
- Writing: a public notebook and essay archive as the main reading path.

meet.label: Get to know me
meet.addition: This scenario is about a natural icebreaker. Make the opening feel like one real person trying to meet another real person, not a social template.

thought.label: Discuss an essay / idea
thought.shortDescription: Start a conversation around writing and thinking.
thought.addition: This scenario is about continuing a conversation around an essay, an idea, or a piece of expression. First remind me to clarify: what I read, which point triggered me, and what I want to discuss next.

create.label: Collaborate on something
create.addition: This scenario is about collaboration, an interview, a project, or an opportunity. First help me clarify: what I want to do, what I can offer, and how I hope Alex responds.
